title: Reviewed Vouches
description: Shows how many Vouches a user has on DonutSMP.net to see if there trusted when trading!
body:
# **Are you a Trusted DonutSMP Trader?**

The DonutSMP Vouch Mod is a custom Minecraft server-side mod designed specifically for the DonutSMP community. This mod seamlessly integrates with our Discord server to track vouches, providing an easy and automated way to monitor trustworthiness and reputation among players.

## **How It Works**
A player receives a vouch on discord.gg/donutvouches Discord server.

A Vouch staff approves or denies vouch from player. If the users vouch gets accepted it will be added to the database therefore giving you a vouch on the mod showcasing it on donutsmp.

## IMPORTANT NOTE!!

Reviewed Vouches and it's creators are in no way affiliated with DonutSMP and its creators. We are a separate community driven to create a better experience for the players of DonutSMP. 

## **Commands**

/vouches <player> to view vouch counts in-game.

/enablevouches enables the vouch prefix to be viewed.

/disablevouches disables the vouch prefix so it cant be viewed.

## Issues?

If you recieve any issues or bugs with the mod, please inform us on **Discord** by opening a General Support ticket.
